news.title:
PI Industries Ltd schedules analyst/investor meets on Feb 27, 2026, and Mar 4, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed during these meetings.
news.summary:
PI Industries Ltd schedules analyst/investor meets on Feb 27, 2026, and Mar 4, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed during these meetings.

news.title:
PI Industries faces challenges with weak CSM business, Q3FY26 revenue down 22.2% YoY to ₹1,376 cr, missing estimates.
Stock down 18% in 6 months; margin pressure, slow growth, and FY27 P/E at 30x deter optimism despite diversification efforts.
news.summary:
PI Industries faces challenges with weak CSM business, Q3FY26 revenue down 22.2% YoY to ₹1,376 cr, missing estimates.
Stock down 18% in 6 months; margin pressure, slow growth, and FY27 P/E at 30x deter optimism despite diversification efforts.

news.title:
Pi Industries' order book nears $1.2B, indicating strong custom synthesis and manufacturing growth.
Company projects significant segment growth by Q4, driven by robust demand for services.
news.summary:
Pi Industries' order book nears $1.2B, indicating strong custom synthesis and manufacturing growth.
Company projects significant segment growth by Q4, driven by robust demand for services.

news.title: PI Industries sets February 23, 2026, as the record date for interim dividend eligibility.
news.summary: PI Industries sets February 23, 2026, as the record date for interim dividend eligibility.

news.title:
PI Industries Q3 net profit at ₹311 Cr, revenue ₹1,376 Cr.
EBITDA stands at ₹302 Cr with a margin of 22%.
news.summary:
PI Industries Q3 net profit at ₹311 Cr, revenue ₹1,376 Cr.
EBITDA stands at ₹302 Cr with a margin of 22%.

news.title:
PI Industries approved Q3 & 9-month results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Declared Rs. 5/share interim dividend; Rs. 1,051 Mn write-back, Rs. 206 Mn liability.
news.summary:
PI Industries approved Q3 & 9-month results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Declared Rs. 5/share interim dividend; Rs. 1,051 Mn write-back, Rs. 206 Mn liability.

news.title:
PI Industries schedules Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 9:30 AM IST.
Management will discuss results and hold a Q&A session. Pre-registration is required for participation.
news.summary:
PI Industries schedules Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 9:30 AM IST.
Management will discuss results and hold a Q&A session. Pre-registration is required for participation.

news.title:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.
news.summary:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.

news.title:
PI Industries appoints Ms. Kamali Rajesh as Global Chief People Officer effective January 19, 2026.
Mr. Balasubramaniam Aiyaswamy will cease to be part of senior management on the same date.
news.summary:
PI Industries appoints Ms. Kamali Rajesh as Global Chief People Officer effective January 19, 2026.
Mr. Balasubramaniam Aiyaswamy will cease to be part of senior management on the same date.

news.title:
PI Industries faces a tax demand of ₹3.9 Cr under CGST & PGST Acts for FY 2021-22.
The company plans to appeal, stating no material financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
PI Industries faces a tax demand of ₹3.9 Cr under CGST & PGST Acts for FY 2021-22.
The company plans to appeal, stating no material financial or operational impact.

news.title:
PI Industries faces pressure as key client Kumiai Chemicals cuts FY26 guidance.
The development was reported by CNBC TV18, impacting PI Industries' outlook.
news.summary:
PI Industries faces pressure as key client Kumiai Chemicals cuts FY26 guidance.
The development was reported by CNBC TV18, impacting PI Industries' outlook.

news.title:
Kumiai projects a 5% revenue decline and 32% drop in FY26 operating profit.
This raises concerns for Pi Industries, which relies on Kumiai as a key client.
news.summary:
Kumiai projects a 5% revenue decline and 32% drop in FY26 operating profit.

news.title:
PI Industries sees 38% YoY growth in AgChem exports H1, driven by new launches.
Pharma business grows 54% YoY; biologicals investment continues amid erratic rains impact.
news.summary:
PI Industries sees 38% YoY growth in AgChem exports H1, driven by new launches.

news.title:
PI Industries shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting financial performance, industry challenges, and growth strategies.
Revenue declined 16% YoY due to agrochemical headwinds; strong growth seen in new products and pharma segment with ongoing investments.
news.summary:
PI Industries shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting financial performance, industry challenges, and growth strategies.
Revenue declined 16% YoY due to agrochemical headwinds; strong growth seen in new products and pharma segment with ongoing investments.

news.title:
PI Industries CEO of AgChem resigns, effective Nov 21, 2025.
Global Ag CEO takes over Nov 22, ensuring continuity; successor has 30 years' agri experience.
news.summary:
PI Industries CEO of AgChem resigns, effective Nov 21, 2025.
Global Ag CEO takes over Nov 22, ensuring continuity; successor has 30 years' agri experience.

news.title:
PI Industries released audio of its Nov 12 earnings call discussing Q2 and H1 FY2025 results.
The recording is available on PI Industries' official website for reference by investors and analysts.
news.summary:

news.title:
PI Industries plans 8-10 new molecule launches in FY27.
Targets global life science leadership with INR 4,415M H1 FY26 investment.
